$comment: Configuration for tools/dedup.py — multi-fidelity event matching + ranked retrieval (issue #10). Per-source authority is the C-model dedup ranking agreed in chat: emailed meeting notes are most deliberate (1 = highest), followed by Slack meeting-note posts, Granola, Meet transcript, generic transcript drop. Authority numbers are absolute ranks, lower-is-better.

thresholds.$comment: Cluster decision uses 0.3*date_score + 0.7*cosine_score. Cluster if combined >= cluster_threshold. Tighten by raising cluster_threshold; loosen by lowering it.
